channel.title: 读书笔记/英语 on 谷丽杳的博客
channel.description: Recent content in 读书笔记/英语 on 谷丽杳的博客

item.title: {{TITLE}}
item.description: 生词/词组 单词/词组 释义 例句 Prevailing wisdom suggest that 主流观点表示 molecules 分子 double-edged sword 双刃剑 procrastinate 拖延 get off the ground 实现 but such behavior change would never get off the ground in a dictatorship incongruent 不一致的 Behavior that is incongruent with the self will not last. morphed into an undesirable grooming ritua 演变成了一种不受欢迎的梳妆仪式 first-ever manicure 有史以来第一次剪指甲 not even a single close call. 连一次侥幸的机会都没有 biceps 二头肌 fight tooth and nail to 拼尽全力 Once your pride gets involved, you’ll fight tooth and nail to maintain your habits.
